mapper.select: SELECT * FROM training_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND record_date = #{recordDate}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO training_record (user_id, record_date, plan_id, training_day_id, training_type, start_time, end_time, duration_minutes, note) VALUES (#{userId}, #{recordDate}, #{planId}, #{trainingDayId}, #{trainingType}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{durationMinutes}, #{note})
